testcase.name: test_01_user_login

failure.message: AssertionError: Response should contain token assert 'token' in {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJkaXBhbGlAY2x1YmNvbmNpZXJnZS5pbiIsInJvbGUiOiJ1c2VyIiwiZXhwIjoxNzcxMzg5ODE4fQ.Vnx6M5aH1zNg6ALLdsJwW0dWkP_NkbnavKmMv1NaRdA', 'message': 'Login successful', 'mira_access': {'allowed': True, 'limit': 3, 'message': None, 'priority': False, ...}, 'token_type': 'bearer', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_personalized_picks_vault.py:40: in test_01_user_login assert "token" in data, "Response should contain token" E AssertionError: Response should contain token E assert 'token' in {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJkaXBhbGlAY2x1YmNvbmNpZXJnZS5pbiIsInJvbGUiOiJ1c2VyIiwiZXhwIjoxNzcxMzg5ODE4fQ.Vnx6M5aH1zNg6ALLdsJwW0dWkP_NkbnavKmMv1NaRdA', 'message': 'Login successful', 'mira_access': {'allowed': True, 'limit': 3, 'message': None, 'priority': False, ...}, 'token_type': 'bearer', ...}
